backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the WRAITH backend defining all data types (Mission, AssetProfile, ThreatAssessment, ClassifiedNote, MissionBriefing) and state maps, with CRUD functions for each entity protected by access control and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three high-level product features (Mission Dashboard, Intelligence Hub, Field Ops Briefing Tool) to their corresponding frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, covering pages and components for missions, intelligence hub, and field ops briefing.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the WRAITH React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application entry point that sets up TanStack Router with authentication guards, a login screen, profile setup modal, and routes for Mission Dashboard, Intelligence Hub, and Field Ops Briefing pages.
frontend/src/components/AssetProfileForm: Form component for creating and editing operative asset profiles, including codename, clearance level, status, bio, and multi-select specializations, wired to backend create/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/AssetProfilesSec: Displays a list of asset profiles with options to create, edit, and delete entries, using dialogs and alert dialogs for form and confirmation UI.
frontend/src/components/BriefingForm.tsx: Form component for creating or updating mission briefings, including fields for objectives, HVT profiles, classification level, and mission metadata.
frontend/src/components/BriefingView.tsx: Read-only full-screen view of a mission briefing document with print support, displaying objectives, HVT profiles, classification banner, and mission details.
frontend/src/components/ClassificationBa: Simple banner component that displays a styled classification level label based on a given ClearanceLevel prop.
frontend/src/components/ClassifiedNoteFo: Form component for creating or editing classified notes, with fields for title, body, classification level, and author.
frontend/src/components/EncryptedNotesSe: Displays a list of classified notes with expand/collapse for body content, and supports creating, editing, and deleting notes via dialogs.
Displays a scrollable log of field reports for a given mission codename and provides a form to submit new reports via the `useAddFieldReport` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that renders a full-screen background image with a dark overlay, a top navigation bar, a main content outlet, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/MissionDetail.ts: Shows detailed information for a single mission (metadata, objectives, operatives, field reports) and toggles into an edit view using MissionForm.
frontend/src/components/MissionForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing a mission, managing fields like codename, status, threat level, mission type, operatives, and objectives via create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/MissionList.tsx: Renders a filterable, paginated list of missions with status and threat level filters, view navigation, and delete confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar with the WRAITH logo, desktop and mobile nav links, and an Internet Identity login/logout button that also displays the authenticated user's profile.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time operative registration that collects name, callsign, and department, then saves the profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/components/RedactionBar.tsx: A simple presentational component that renders a black inline bar to visually redact content, with configurable width.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a styled badge for a `MissionStatus` enum value, applying color and glow styles based on the status (active, compromised, completed, aborted).
frontend/src/components/ThreatAssessment: A form component for creating or editing a `ThreatAssessment`, with fields for subject name, threat category, risk score slider, summary, and linked missions.
Displays a list of all threat assessments with risk-colored indicators, and provides UI for creating, editing, and deleting assessments via dialogs.
Renders an icon and label for a `ThreatLevel` enum value (low, elevated, critical) with appropriate colors and glow effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor calls including CRUD operations for missions, user profiles, asset profiles, threat assessments, classified notes, mission briefings, and HVT profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing custom fonts and defining a dark military/ops-themed design system with OKLCH CSS variables for colors, classification levels, status indicators, and utility component classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging, timestamp formatting, and label/class mapping for domain enums like ClearanceLevel, MissionStatus, ThreatLevel, asset status, threat categories, and specializations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/FieldOpsBriefing.tsx: Page component for managing classified mission briefing documents, supporting create, edit, view, and delete operations with stats summary and a list of briefings.
frontend/src/pages/IntelligenceHub.tsx: Page component that organizes asset profiles, threat assessments, and encrypted notes into a tabbed interface under the Intelligence Hub section.
frontend/src/pages/MissionDashboard.tsx: Page component displaying a mission operations dashboard with stats, a mission list, and dialogs for creating new missions or viewing mission details.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark ops-themed design system with custom OKLCH colors, spy-thriller fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for a WRAITH-themed classified intelligence app, documenting existing features (Mission Dashboard, Intelligence Hub, Field Ops Briefing Tool), architectural notes, and image requirements.
